policies.policy_description: Introduction of a non-risk based leverage ratio as a supplementary measure to risk-based capital requirements.
policies.objective: To constrain excessive leverage and reinforce risk-based requirements.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Definition and calculation of the leverage ratio based on capital and total exposure measures.
subpolicies.control: Minimum Tier 1 leverage ratio of 3% during the parallel run period.

compliances.Description: Maintain a minimum Tier 1 leverage ratio of 3% during the parallel run period as defined in the leverage ratio calculation subpolicy.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Annex 4: Phase-in arrangements - Leverage Ratio
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Maintain a minimum Tier 1 leverage ratio of 3% during the parallel run period as defined in the leverage ratio calculation subpolicy.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Minimum Tier 1 Leverage Ratio' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Capital measure based on the new definition of Tier 1 capital.
subpolicies.control: Consistent measurement of capital and exposure to avoid double counting.

compliances.Description: Ensure that the measurement of Tier 1 capital adheres to the new regulatory definitions and guidelines.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Annex 4: Phase-in arrangements - Leverage Ratio
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that the measurement of Tier 1 capital adheres to the new regulatory definitions and guidelines.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Tier 1 Capital Measurement' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Implement controls to ensure that capital and exposure are measured consistently to avoid any instances of double counting.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Annex 4: Phase-in arrangements - Leverage Ratio
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Implement controls to ensure that capital and exposure are measured consistently to avoid any instances of double counting.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Double Counting Prevention' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Calculate the leverage ratio based on the defined Tier 1 capital and total exposure as per the latest guidelines.

compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Calculate the leverage ratio based on the defined Tier 1 capital and total exposure as per the latest guidelines.
